summary: Tested Customer Loyalty Card and Employee ID Card features. Both backend APIs return proper business info. Frontend components correctly display store name, address, and company name. All 6 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verification confirms all required data is shown.

features_tested.feature: Loyalty Card API returns store name and address
features_tested.details: GET /api/customers/{id}/loyalty-card returns business.name, business.store_name, business.address, business.phone

features_tested.feature: Employee ID Card API returns company name
Customer Loyalty Card (MembershipCardPreview) shows store info
features_tested.details: Card displays: Company Name (BijnisBooks Store), Store Name (Main Store), Address (123 Test Street), Phone, Customer details, Loyalty points, Tier badge, QR code

features_tested.feature: Employee ID Card shows company name in header
features_tested.details: Header displays 'BIJNISBOOKS DEMO STORE' in blue banner

features_tested.feature: Employee ID Card shows company name in footer
features_tested.details: Footer displays 'This card is property of BijnisBooks Demo Store'

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing test customer and employee.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Loyalty Card is accessed from Customers page -> Click on Membership Card button. Employee ID Card is accessed from Employees page (HR MANAGEMENT section) -> Click on ID Card button for any employee. Both cards now properly display business branding info from the backend APIs.
